calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-23-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2022 Continued To Jan-23-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John D. Parker, in court, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court and Petitioner discuss the pending Examiner's notes and the status of this matter. The court confirms with Petitioner that he has considered hiring legal counsel to assist him but that he is unable to do so at this time. The court suggests that Petitioner contact the SF Bar for assistance and Petitioner is provided with their contact information. The court and Petitioner review the pending Examiner's notes that require his attention, and he is advised that the notes will need to be resolved before this matter can proceed.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Jan-23-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
